title: Disability Savings Accounts - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Disability Savings Accounts 1 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON STATE TREASURY UPWARD OREGON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps people save for education, retirement, and disability-related expenses. Programs are managed by the Oregon State Treasury and overseen by the Oregon 529 Savings Board or the Oregon Retirement Savings Board. The Oregon ABLE Savings Plan helps people with disabilities and their families save money without risking eligibility for important government benefits. Embark helps families save for college and job training, making higher education and career training more accessible for Oregon residents. OregonSaves provides a way for workers to save for retirement. Employees are automatically enrolled through their employer but can choose to opt in or out at any time. Visit the website for current program details and timelines. 867 Hawthorne Avenue SE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Oregon ABLE Savings Plan: Monday-Friday 6am-5pm Embark: Monday-Friday 6am-5pm OregonSaves: Monday-Friday 7am-7pm Email (503) 378-4000 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE TREASURY UPWARD OREGON
